turns.speaker: PATIENT (bot)
turns.text: Hey, hello!

turns.speaker: PGAI AGENT
turns.text: This call may be recorded for quality and training purposes.

turns.speaker: PGAI AGENT
turns.text: Thanks for calling Pivot Point Orthopaedics.

turns.speaker: PGAI AGENT
turns.text: part of pretty good AI.

turns.speaker: PGAI AGENT
turns.text: Am I speaking with Paul?

turns.speaker: PATIENT (bot)
turns.text: Oh, hey, yeah, this is Paul. I’m calling about something with my knee.

turns.speaker: PGAI AGENT
turns.text: Please provide your data first.

turns.speaker: PATIENT (bot)
turns.text: Sure, it's February 15th, 1988.

turns.speaker: PGAI AGENT
turns.text: Great, Paul.

turns.speaker: PGAI AGENT
turns.text: I've been an Opie today.

turns.speaker: PATIENT (bot)
turns.text: Yeah, so my knee’s been acting up, especially when I go downstairs—it kind of locks up. I'm trying to figure out if I can get in to see someone about it.

turns.speaker: PGAI AGENT
turns.text: It sounds like you need to be seen for a knee issue that's causing pain and locking.

turns.speaker: PGAI AGENT
turns.text: Would you like to book an acute visit for this urgent concern?

turns.speaker: PATIENT (bot)
turns.text: Yeah, that’d be great. When’s the soonest you’ve got?

turns.speaker: PGAI AGENT
turns.text: You already have an acute visit booked for this issue. If you want, I can help you reschedule or cancel that appointment.

turns.speaker: PGAI AGENT
turns.text: Would you like to make a change or do you need to speak with someone from our team?

turns.speaker: PATIENT (bot)
turns.text: Oh, wait, I don’t remember having one booked. Could you check what date that appointment’s on?

turns.speaker: PGAI AGENT
turns.text: No problem. I can connect you with a team member who can check your records and help sort this out.

turns.speaker: PGAI AGENT
turns.text: Would you like me to transfer you now?

turns.speaker: PATIENT (bot)
turns.text: Actually, before you transfer me, can you just tell me who the appointment was supposed to be with?

turns.speaker: PGAI AGENT
turns.text: I don't have access to the details of your existing appointment. I'll transfer you to a team member who can look that up and help you further. One moment while I connect you.

turns.speaker: PATIENT (bot)
turns.text: Oh, hang on, one quick thing—do you know if Dr. Sandoval is taking new patients right now?

turns.speaker: PGAI AGENT
turns.text: Dr. Sandoval is not listed as a provider at Pivot Point Orthopedics.

turns.speaker: PGAI AGENT
turns.text: Our current providers are Dr. Hauser.

turns.speaker: PGAI AGENT
turns.text: Dr. Roth.

turns.speaker: PGAI AGENT
turns.text: Dr. Bricker, Lynn Anderson, and Carl Mentz.

turns.speaker: PGAI AGENT
turns.text: Would you like information about...

turns.speaker: PATIENT (bot)
turns.text: Actually, could you tell me a bit about Dr. Hauser—like their specialty or how long they’ve been there?

turns.speaker: PGAI AGENT
turns.text: Dr. Hauser focuses on quick orthopedic procedures and first-time patient evaluation.

turns.speaker: PGAI AGENT
turns.text: He's known for being efficient and reassuring.

turns.speaker: PGAI AGENT
turns.text: making him a great choice for new patients or straightforward orthopedic concerns.

turns.speaker: PGAI AGENT
turns.text: Would you like to schedule with Dr. Hauser?

turns.speaker: PATIENT (bot)
turns.text: Yeah, that sounds good. What's the earliest open slot Dr. Hauser’s got?

turns.speaker: PGAI AGENT
turns.text: It looks like you already have an acute visit booked, so I can't schedule another of the same type. I can connect you with a team member who can review your records and help with rescheduling or other options. Would you like to be transferred now?

turns.speaker: PATIENT (bot)
turns.text: Alright, yeah, go ahead and transfer me.

turns.speaker: PGAI AGENT
turns.text: Please stay on the line.

turns.speaker: PGAI AGENT
turns.text: I'll connect you to our patient support team so they can review your records and help you schedule with Dr. Hauser.

turns.speaker: PATIENT (bot)
turns.text: Sure, I’m here. No rush.

turns.speaker: PGAI AGENT
turns.text: connecting you to a representative.

turns.speaker: PGAI AGENT
turns.text: Please wait.

turns.speaker: PATIENT (bot)
turns.text: Got it, I’ll hang tight.

turns.speaker: PGAI AGENT
turns.text: Hello.

turns.speaker: PGAI AGENT
turns.text: You've reached the Pretty Good AI test line. Goodbye.

turns.speaker: PATIENT (bot)
turns.text: Oh, wait, before you go—can you just confirm if that appointment I had was for morning or afternoon?
